title: erophila strigosula
intro: Erophila strigosula, also known as woolly false lichenor, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erophila strigosula include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. Erophila strigosula can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
